name: Bacon- Oyster Bites
recipeIngredient: 1 can (5 oz.) smoked oysters, drained & chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Partially cook the bacon.
2. Combine the oysters, herb stuffing mix and water.
3. Shape into balls using 1 tablespoon of mixture.
4. Wrap a half slice of bacon around each ball and secure with a toothpick.
5. Place the balls on a rack in a shallow baking pan.
6. Bake in a preheated 350 degree F oven for 25-30 minutes.
Yield: 16 balls
